person.name: Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook

nameForms.fullText: Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Per a 2013 post on soc.genealogy.medieval: "Harl.MS.2065 contains extracts from early Cheshire Inquisitions Post Mortem and on f.25, dated to 32 Henry III (1248) is the order to John de Grey, justiciar of Chester, to make the inquisition into which lands Warin de Vernon held of the king in chief.

"The interesting elements from a genealogical perspective come from the jurors comments on his heir.

«b»"My rough translation is:«/b»

"When Warin was a young man he loved a certain woman named Auda who was first betrothed to Roger de Altaribus, and he took her into England after which the said Warin returned to Cheshire and held her as his own, and by her was born outside marriage a certain Annore by name, and Warin and William, and after censure from the church he married her, and after the marriage was approved was born Ralph"

"I need to check my transcription/translation when I next return to the BL, as (typically) I found it fifteen minutes before the manuscripts room closed for the day and cameras are not allowed. It does though seem to pick up on, and clarify, a few elements of the Vernon/Malbank story.

"After the death of Warin de Vernon in 1248, his inheritance was quickly divided between his son Ralph, and his grandson Warin, (the son of the Warin mentioned in the 1248 IPM). Ralph and Warin made a fine with the King of 100 marks on 15 Feb 1248/9 for his confirmation of their agreed split.
 
This arrangement though had always struck me as a slightly unusual arrangement, and indeed a relatively mutual and civil agreement. If, as the jurors in the IPM suggest, there was general doubt over the legitimacy, but not the actual parentage of Warin, then this eventual split of the Vernon inheritanace could have been a practical resolution to this.

"Another element from this IPM is the naming of Roger de Altaribus. Auda's first husband is often stated to be Hugh de Altaribus, but there seems to have been a son by this first marriage of that name and confusion could have crept in from this. BL Harl MS 2077, f.63, is a transcript of a charter which dates from before c.1230 from Hugh de Altaripus son of Alde Malbank to "Warin de Vernon my father in law and Warin his son, my brother." However this transcription will need some further corroboration as Harl MS 1988, f.159 has another copy of the same charter in which it is transcribed, not as Hugh, but as "Auda de Altaribus filia Alde Maubank concessi Warino de Veron patri meo in lege et Warino filio suo fratri meo." If Hugh de Altaribus was a son, he may also have taken the name of his step-family as a Hugh de Vernon appears c.1216-c.1230 as parson of Davenham in a charter by Warin de Vernon to his son Nicholas of land at Haslegrove. 

Who Roger de Altaribus was, or what his background was, I am not yet sure. Indeed given that the jurors were recollecting details of a presumably brief marriage from almost 50 years earlier, then there is a chance that the name of Roger could have been incorrectly recalled.

"Another element to note from the transcript of the IPM are the jurors comments that Warin took Auda into England. At this time Cheshire was not viewed as part of England, so this comment would refer to Warin and Auda simply heading out of the county. (See H.Hewitt, _Medieval Cheshire_, Chetham Society, 1929, p.7 for more on this perspective plus other examples of this turn of phrase). Indeed, this might have some corroboration from an essoin recorded under the county of Oxfordshire that was provided by Nicholas son of Thomas in 1201 for the case between Warin de Vernon and the King in a plea over why Warin had married without the consent of the King.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook於大約1178年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook24歲，母親Alice Avice De Avenel24歲。他於1204年與Auda Malbank在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1247年在英國巴金哈姆爾鮑頓享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook于大约1178年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook24岁，母亲Alice Avice De Avenel24岁。他于1204年与Auda Malbank在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1247年在英国巴金哈姆爾鮑頓享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook was born about 1178, in Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook, was 24 and his mother, Alice Avice De Avenel, was 24. He married Auda Malbank in 1204, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1247, in Broughton, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook est né environ 1178, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Avice De Avenel, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Auda Malbank en 1204, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1247, à Broughton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

Er hat 1204 in Cheshire, England Auda Malbank geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1247 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Broughton, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrookが約1178年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrookは24歳，母Alice Avice De Avenelは24歳であった。1204年にイギリスチェシュアイアでAuda Malbankと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1247年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブロウトンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook(이)가 대략 1178년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Avice De Avenel(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1204년 영국 체실르에서 Auda Malbank(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1247년 영국 벅잉함실르 브루그h턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook родился около 1178 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Avice De Avenel, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Auda Malbank в 1204 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1247 г. в местности броугтон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.
